title: Cascading Failure Under Noise
description: Triage 30 alerts across 15 services. Four to five distinct incidents with deep cascade chains (3-5 dependency hops). Five to eight noise/false-alarm alerts mixed in. Monitoring system mislabels one false alarm as 'critical'. Alerts are temporally interleaved across incidents. One stealth incident: root cause service shows subtle degradation while downstream dependents fail loudly. Tight step budget demands efficient triage — brute-force strategies fail.
